heading: Today
text: Sun, mixing with some clouds northeast. Clouds increasing by midday in the the Hudson Valley and Berkshires, spreading northeast this afternoon. Highs in the 50s to near 60. Winds light, becoming east less than 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Becoming mostly cloudy, thicker toward the MA border, with a chance a shower in northern MA. Partial clearing after midnight from the Adirondacks and Rt. 4 north. Lows in the low to mid 30s, upper 20s in the cold spots. Winds east to southeast less than 10 mph, near calm in sheltered valleys.

heading: Sunday
text: Becoming partly to mostly sunny, except more periods of clouds through NH. Highs 60 to 65, a few upper 50s in NH. Winds light and variable.
